text: Persist structured experiments and belief updates across loop cycles
description: For each real-world bet, persist the hypothesis, prediction, expected cost/upside, success metric, stop condition, evidence, result, belief update, economic outcome reference, and next decision. Connect this record to existing hypothesis generation and evaluation aims.

status.comment: Durable structured experiments and one compact loop tool are implemented; awaiting user acceptance.

reflection: Added .bowman/runtime/experiments.json with validated create/list/update operations. Records aims, hypothesis, prediction, expected cost/upside, metric, stop condition, status, append-only evidence, result, confidence update, external economic reference, and next decision. Exposed one experiment action tool to limit tool-surface growth. Verification: agent-tools and loop-worker typechecks pass; focused persistence test passes.
